allow: Bash(tail -n +300 "./네이버 블로그 자동 작성 프로그램 \(안경원\).md" | head -400)

Bash(gti --prompt "A flat minimalist app icon. Centered: a pair of round eyeglasses in deep indigo color \(hex 4f46e5\) with subtle highlight. Inside the lenses: a stylized capital letter N representing Naver, in white. Background: soft indigo radial gradient on a rounded square. Clean modern flat design suitable as a desktop and browser icon. Square 1:1 aspect ratio. No outside text or watermark. Crisp edges, slightly raised pill shape, professional minimal look." --output C:/project/naverpost/public/icon-source.png --provider auto)

Bash(powershell -NoProfile -Command 'Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match '\\''next \(dev|start\)|3100'\\'' } | Select-Object ProcessId, CommandLine | Format-List')
Bash(uv --directory apps/api run ruff check src)
Bash(BLOGOPS_DATABASE_URL="postgresql+asyncpg://blogops:blogops_local_password@127.0.0.1:5432/blogops" uv --directory apps/api run uvicorn blogops_api.main:app --app-dir src --port 8002)

Bash(PGPASSWORD=blogops_local_password "C:/Program Files/PostgreSQL/16/bin/psql.exe" -U blogops -d blogops -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5432 -c "DELETE FROM posts WHERE id IN \(1,2\);" -c "SELECT count\(*\) FROM posts;")

Bash(gti --prompt "A realistic candid photo inside a modern bright present-day Korean eyewear store exam room, a Korean customer \(East Asian Korean, not Western\) seated in the exam chair, the autorefractor/phoropter pulled directly in front of the customer's face, customer resting chin and forehead on the instrument looking into it, a Korean optician seated on a round stool beside operating it, navy accent wall, clean modern equipment, no text no letters no signage, true-to-life color, sharp, NOT film, NOT vintage. --ar 4:3" --output "$\(pwd\)/.tmp-scene-test/exam_attractiger.png" --provider private-codex --image "$\(pwd\)/data/shop-refs/attractiger/다운로드 \(2\).jpg")
